mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM BILL_LEARNING_DATA bld WHERE
mapper.sql: /*view colmn name : db comment*/ bld.BRCD, /*부점코드*/ bld.BDGT_PRFR_YM, /*예산집행년월*/ bld.BDGT_PRFR_NO, /*예산집행번호*/ bld.BDGT_PRFR_YMD, /*집행년월일*/ bld.BASE_YM, /*기준년월*/ bld.ISS_SRN, /*발행일련번호*/ bld.TXBL_SRN, /*세금계산서일련번호*/ bld.HDQR_BOB_DCD, /*영업점*/ bld.TXBL_DCD, /*세금계산서구분코드 (S 세금계산서, K 계산서)*/ bld.SPLR_BSNN_NO, /*공급자사업자번호*/ bld.SPLR_FRM, /*공급자상호명*/ bld.SPLR_BZST_NM, /*공급자업태명*/ bld.SPLR_ITMS_NM, /*공급자종목명*/ bld.ISS_AMT, /*발행금액*/ bld.TXBL_LSAR_NM, /*세금계산서품목명*/ bld.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO, /*예산관리비목관리번호(비목코드)*/ bld.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, /*예산사업ID내용(사업-세부사업)*/ bld.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON, /*비목집행사유내용(비목-집행사유코드)*/ bld.RCV_YMD, /*수신년월일*/ bld.JOB_YMD /*작업년월일*/
mapper.select:
SELECT
from BILL_LEARNING_DATA bld where order by bld.FRRG_TS desc
